welcome.englishOnlyActiveNote: English is available now. More languages are staged next.
welcome.heroTitle: A few quick steps and you are ready.
welcome.heroDesc: You can revisit everything later in Settings.
welcome.step1Desc: After this, we move on to metadata access and library folders.
welcome.appWideDesc: These preferences shape how SWAYA behaves across the rest of the app.
welcome.title: Choose your interface language
welcome.description: Select your interface language to begin setup.

choice.configureNewSetupDesc: Start fresh and let us guide you step-by-step through setting up TMDb, OMDb, and your media folder paths.
choice.importBackupProfileDesc: Instantly load your settings from an existing SWAYA backup file.
choice.heroTitle: Choose how you want to begin.
choice.heroDesc: Start from scratch or bring in a saved profile.
choice.step2Desc: This decides whether the next steps build a fresh setup or use an existing one.
choice.flexibleDesc: You can keep going manually or jump ahead by importing a backup file.
choice.title: How would you like to continue?
choice.description: Pick the setup path that fits how you want to configure SWAYA.

tmdb.requiredToContinueDesc: We'll need this to unlock real title matching, posters, backdrops, and cast info.
tmdb.onlyOnce: Only needs to be done once
tmdb.onlyOnceDesc: Enter both the TMDb API Key (v3) and Read Access Token (v4) once, and SWAYA will remember them for you.
tmdb.showMe: Show me where to get it
tmdb.title: Paste your TMDB keys to unlock scanning
tmdb.description: Both values are required before SWAYA can move past this step.
tmdb.footerLabel: This step blocks the next one
tmdb.footerValue: Validate both keys to continue onboarding

omdb.optionalButRecommendedDesc: A free OMDb API key lets you pull IMDb ratings and Rotten Tomatoes scores automatically.
omdb.title: Paste your OMDb key to unlock ratings
omdb.description: This key is required before SWAYA can enrich items with ratings data.
omdb.footerLabel: This step blocks the next one
omdb.footerValue: Validate the OMDb key to continue onboarding

completion.title: Setup Complete!
completion.description: SWAYA is all set up and ready to organize your media! Click Finish to save and open your dashboard.

folder.heroDesc: Set the source folder SWAYA watches and, if you want, the clean library destination it should build into.
folder.step5Desc: This tells SWAYA where your unorganized files live and where finished media can go.
folder.validateDesc: SWAYA checks the folders now so the first scan does not fail later.
folder.title: Set your library folders
folder.description: Pick the folders SWAYA should read from and organize into.

tmdbGuide.scanningLimited: Without TMDb, we can only read basic file info like size and format.
tmdbGuide.scanningLimitedDesc: SWAYA needs TMDB before scanning can do real metadata matching, artwork lookups, and clean organization.

omdbGuide.ratingsPurposeDesc: SWAYA uses OMDb to fetch IMDb, Metascore, and Rotten Tomatoes ratings when fetching details.
omdbGuide.ratingsMetricsDesc: These ratings are what you see on the movie and show detail pages.

toasts.validationServerFailed: Failed to connect to validation server.
